name: Policy Quote Creation
description: Create insurance quotes with premium calculation, coverage selection, and quote number generation

name: Policy Binding
description: Convert quotes to binding policies with effective dates and policy number assignment

name: Policy Issuance
description: Approve and issue policies with automated document generation (declarations, coverage pages)

name: Policy Search & Retrieval
description: Search policies by number, insured name, type, location; retrieve details within 3-5 seconds

name: Policy Detail View
description: Display complete policy details: insured, coverages, vehicle/location info, linked claims; WCAG compliant

name: Policy Endorsement
description: Add, remove, or modify coverages mid-term with pro-rata premium adjustments and audit tracking

name: Policy Renewal
description: Generate renewal quotes, track renewal status, auto-expire policies, send renewal notices

name: Policy Cancellation
description: Cancel policies with 30-day notice, pro-rata refund calculation, and regulatory compliance

name: Claim Filing (FNOL)
description: File First Notice of Loss with coverage verification, reserve estimation, claimant tracking

name: Claim Search & History
description: Search and retrieve claim history by claim number, policy, insured; sort/filter by status and date

name: Claim Investigation & Adjustment
description: Investigate claims, gather documentation, request additional info, determine reserve adjustments

name: Claim Settlement & Denial
description: Approve claims with settlement amounts or deny with reason codes and denial notices

name: Claim Reopening
description: Reopen closed/settled/denied claims with new evidence, re-evaluation, and reserve adjustments

name: Claim-Level Policy Data Management
description: Add/modify policy info at claim level for unverified policies; track changes separately with visual indicators

name: Subrogation & Recovery Tracking
description: Identify, track, and manage subrogation cases; record third-party recoveries and apply to claims

name: Scheduled Payments Management
description: Create and manage structured settlements, periodic payment schedules with payment tracking

name: Payment Method Configuration
description: Configure ACH, Wire, Card, Stripe Connect, Global Payouts; set routing rules and limits

name: Payee Onboarding & KYC
description: Onboard vendors/claimants with KYC verification, bank account verification, tax ID collection

name: Payment Creation
description: Create payments with multiple payee support, deductions, reserve allocation, eroding flags

name: Payment Approval Workflow
description: Review and approve payments based on amount thresholds before processing

name: Payment Processing & Disbursement
description: Process approved payments via ACH, Wire, Card, Stripe, or Global Payouts with confirmation numbers

name: Payment Reversal, Void & Reissue
description: Reverse/void/reissue erroneous payments with credit memos and reserve restoration

name: Tax Withholding & 1099 Reporting
description: Apply income tax withholding, track tax reportable amounts, generate annual 1099 reports

name: Reserve & Payment Allocation
description: Allocate payments to multiple reserve lines with balance tracking and eroding flags

name: Joint Payee Payment Management
description: Split payments between multiple joint payees with flexible portion allocation

name: External Estimate Integration
description: Import and parse Xactimate/XactAnalysis estimates; create reserve lines and payment items

name: Payment Document Attachment
description: Attach supporting documents (PDF, images) to payment records for audit purposes

name: EDI/EOB Remittance to Medical Providers
description: Generate EDI 835 remittances with CPT/ICD mappings; support EOB statements and bill review integration

name: Payment Routing Rules Configuration
description: Configure dynamic routing rules based on payee type, claim type, amount, location

name: Audit Trail & Compliance Logging
description: Comprehensive audit logs for policies, claims, payments; 7-year retention; masked PII

name: Role-Based Access Control
description: Define and enforce roles (Agent, Underwriter, Claims Adjuster, Finance, Admin); permission-based access

name: Data Encryption & PII Protection
description: At-rest and in-transit encryption; SSN/account masking; key management; HTTPS/TLS enforcement

name: Payment Gateway Integration
description: Integrate with Stripe Connect, Global Payouts, ACH provider, Wire service; error handling & retry logic

name: Bank Account & ACH/Wire Processing
description: Configure company bank accounts, generate NACHA ACH files, create wire transfer instructions

name: External Data Source Integration
description: Integrate with litigation data, tax ID verification, accounting system, agency markets, document mgmt

name: Regulatory Compliance Reporting
description: Generate premium reports, claims reports, loss ratio reports, cancellation reports, data retention verification

name: Performance Optimization
description: Ensure policy search < 3s, detail view < 5s, claim retrieval < 5s, payment processing < 5s

name: WCAG AA Accessibility Compliance
description: Ensure all UI compliant with WCAG 2.1 Level AA; keyboard navigation; screen reader support

name: Error Handling & User Messaging
description: Consistent error messages; graceful degradation; retry logic; system unavailability messaging
